mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEST(TET_NUM, CLA_NUM, USER_NUM, TET_TITLE, TET_TIMELIMIT) VALUES(#{tetNum}, #{claNum}, #{userNum}, #{tetTitle}, #{tetTimelimit})
mapper.select: SELECT T.*, Q.QUE_NUM, Q.QUE_SEQ, Q.QUE_TEXT, Q.QUE_OPT1, Q.QUE_OPT2, Q.QUE_OPT3, Q.QUE_OPT4, Q.QUE_ANSWER, Q.QUE_DESC, Q.QUE_POINT FROM TEST T LEFT OUTER JOIN QUESTION Q ON T.TET_NUM = Q.TET_NUM WHERE T.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} ORDER BY Q.QUE_SEQ ASC

SELECT T.TET_NUM, T.TET_TITLE, T.TET_TIMELIMIT, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_STARTDATE, C.CLA_ENDDATE FROM TEST T JOIN CLASS C ON T.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE T.CLA_NUM IN ( SELECT CA.CLA_NUM FROM CLASSAPPLY CA WHERE CA.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON L WHERE L.CLA_NUM = CA.CLA_NUM AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PROGRESS P WHERE P.LSN_NUM = L.LSN_NUM AND P.USER_NUM = CA.USER_NUM AND P.PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y' ) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EXAM_RESULT ER WHERE ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM AND ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum} ) ORDER BY T.TET_NUM DESC

SELECT T.TET_NUM, T.TET_TITLE, ER.ER_NUM, ER.ER_SCORE, ER.ER_PASS, ER.ER_DATE, (SELECT ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN ER_SCORE > ER.ER_SCORE THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100, 1) FROM EXAM_RESULT WHERE TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM) AS topPercent FROM TEST T JOIN EXAM_RESULT ER ON T.TET_NUM = ER.TET_NUM WHERE ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND ER.ER_NUM IN ( SELECT MAX(ER_NUM) FROM EXAM_RESULT WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum} GROUP BY TET_NUM ) ORDER BY ER.ER_DATE DESC
SELECT T.TET_NUM, T.TET_TITLE, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_COMPLETE, T.TET_TIMELIMIT FROM TEST T JOIN CLASS C ON T.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE T.TET_NUM = #{tetNum}
